name: PT Bumi Benowo Sukses Sejahtera Tbk
summary: PT Bumi Benowo Sukses Sejahtera Tbk engages in the construction of warehouses and shop houses in Indonesia. The company was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Surabaya, Indonesia. PT Bumi Benowo Sukses Sejahtera Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Agung Alam Anugrah.
